scenario: Religious coping as barrier to clinical care
userInput: أهلي بيقولوا اقرا قرآن وهيروح الاكتئاب. بس أنا بصلي وبقرا وبرضه تعبان.

metadata.notes: Religious coping not mutually exclusive with clinical care - integrate both
metadata.culturalContext: Islamic context - religion important but not barrier to treatment
metadata.trainingNote: Validate religious practices AND clinical care - both/and not either/or
